headline: Models split on SPY direction amid hot CPI fears and Middle East tensions
summary: AI models showed stark disagreement on market direction, with Claude and GPT-4o predicting downside from anticipated hot CPI data while Grok and Gemini expected continued rallies. Energy sector predictions found consensus on upside due to $100+ oil prices and Strait of Hormuz tensions, while tech names faced mixed outlooks after recent strong runs.

consensus_picks.note: Three models warned of downside from hot CPI print while Gemini and Grok saw continued upside.
Gemini and Grok bullish on AI chip demand while Perplexity called for profit-taking.
GPT-4o saw Bitcoin as inflation hedge while Perplexity expected pressure from higher rates.

best_call.summary: Actual closes not yet available to determine best call.

worst_call.summary: Actual closes not yet available to determine worst call.
